response.justification: The candidate has strong technical depth, extensive open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, particularly in Linux and open-source ecosystems, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive role — and has only basic German proficiency, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Node.js, TypeScript, and Docker in complex systems
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops, indicating communication and knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the required C1 level
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal technical project management experience
Lacks clear executive-level leadership or team management experience beyond individual contributor roles
